title: Kutch Bustard Sanctuary
tagline: Kutch Bustard Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Gujarat

overview.short: Kutch Bustard Sanctuary or Kachchh Great Indian Bustard Sanctuary, also known as Lala–Parjan Sanctuary, is located near Jakhau village in Taluka Abdasa, Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Kutch Bustard Sanctuary or Kachchh Great Indian Bustard Sanctuary, also known as Lala–Parjan Sanctuary, is located near Jakhau village in Taluka Abdasa, Gujarat, India. This sanctuary is one of the two great Indian bustard sanctuaries in Gujarat; the other one is in Jamnagar. It was declared as a sanctuary in July 1992, specifically for the conservation of the great Indian bustard, the heaviest flying bird belonging to the avian family of Otididae. However, the sanctuary presently legally covers a protected area of about 2 square kilometres (0.77 mi2) of area (202.86 hectares (501.3 acres) of

topPlaces.name: Jakhau
topPlaces.description: Jakhau (Ja-kha-oo, pronounced as Ja-kho by locals) is a village in Gujarat, western India. Administratively, it is under Abdasa Taluka, Kutch District, of Gujarat.

topPlaces.name: Ranpur, Abdasa
topPlaces.description: Ranpur (Gujarati: રાણપુર) is a village in Abdasa Taluka of Kutch District in the Indian state of Gujarat. The main occupations of its residents are agriculture, farm labor and animal husbandry.

items.note: Jakhau (Ja-kha-oo, pronounced as Ja-kho by locals) is a village in Gujarat, western India. Administratively, it is under Abdasa Taluka, Kutch District, of Gujarat.
Ranpur (Gujarati: રાણપુર) is a village in Abdasa Taluka of Kutch District in the Indian state of Gujarat. The main occupations of its residents are agriculture, farm labor and animal husbandry.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kutch Bustard Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kutch Bustard Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kutch Bustard Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jamnagar Airport (157 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (236 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kutch Bustard Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kutch Bustard Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kutch Bustard Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kutch Bustard Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kutch Bustard Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jakhau, Ranpur, Abdasa.
